entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Major cereal crop susceptible to moisture deficit

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Major cereal crop susceptible to moisture deficit

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Major cereal crop susceptible to moisture deficit

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Lack of water or moisture deficit limiting plant productivity

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding method used to develop stress-tolerant varieties

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: Method using genetic markers to develop stress-tolerant varieties

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: Technique used to rapidly improve abiotic stress tolerance

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand non-biological environmental stresses

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate gene expression and produce phenotypic alterations in stress responses

entities.name: DREB1A
entities.description: A transcription factor that recognizes dehydration response elements and promotes drought-tolerance genes

entities.name: DEHYDRATION RESPONSE ELEMENTS
entities.description: DNA sequences recognized by the DREB1A transcription factor

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS THALIANA
entities.description: Model plant organism from which the DREB1A gene was sourced

entities.name: DROUGHT-TOLERANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide tolerance to drought when expressed

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and productivity during water deficit

entities.name: STRESS-INDUCIBLE PROMOTER
entities.description: A promoter that activates gene expression in response to stress

entities.name: RD29A GENE
entities.description: Gene providing the stress-inducible promoter for DREB1A

entities.name: BIOLISTIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: Method of gene transfer using particle bombardment

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: Controlled environment where experimental plants were grown

entities.name: WILTING
entities.description: A symptom of water stress characterized by loss of turgidity
